user.title: Connect to Stash
user.description: Enter your Stash server URL and optional API key. Examples: https://stash.example.com, http://192.168.1.100:9999, or 192.168.1.100:9999 (http:// is added automatically).

webhook.title: Webhook Options
webhook.description: Stash sends events directly to HA. More responsive than polling but requires network access from Stash to HA.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Stash. Check the URL and API key.
